feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP ABAP FOR and Corresponding
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I have some issue with below code Kindly Help in this.

I have selected 10 rows from mara and need to pass the serial number for those entires and need to move to another internal table.

 

Below code producing the 

select * from mara into table @DATA(itab) up to 10 rows.
data : begin of maran occurs 0,
         smo type i.
         include structure mara.
data : end of maran.

types : tt_table like  maran[].
data : itabe like  maran.
maran[] = value #( for ls in itab
index into lv_tabix ( corresponding #( ls )  )
                    ( smo =  lv_tabix )      ).

entries as shown below. one entries without  serial number and one with proper one.

Can any one help how to restrict entries without serial number.

 

Regards,

Bharathi

entry.title: keep old ABAP versions, ie in Git (?)
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We want to keep a record/snapshot of all old versions of ABAP / Dict objects of our Dev system, preferably accessible but not necessarily in a running SAP system. I know of old skool method in SAP note "130906", but this keeps it in a SAP system.

A Git repo (or repos) seems like a suitable to address this, either via ABAPgit or gCTS. However, I don't see a clear and easy route to do this. Anybody else wondering about this or similar, and having an idea how to set this up? Or having a completely different approach to address this ABAP versions snapshot requirement?

 

Cheers, Wout

entry.title: GridTable setting in manifest is cutting off the Draft status link to the popover
entry.content:
Hi,
I have a requirement to use the GridTable in our Fiori Elements project with RAP and V4.
When you configure the ListReport to use GridTable in the manifest, it works but it cuts off the Draft hyperlink. It's a small issue but I would like to get rid off it. Or find a workaround to make it look nicer, maybe give it its own column or something like that

Here is an example with the showcase app:

The PO prefers to get rid of Draft all together. But judging from other posts I read this is not possible for this scenario. Any help is much appreciated.

Kind Regards,

Tyler

entry.title: Promises in ABAP - like in Javascript
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Do we have Promises in ABAP  ? 

Thanks-

entry.title: Using odatav2 service from an odatav4 service
entry.content:
Hello guys,

I've converted odata v4 service to odatav2 service in my CAP project using 

odata-v2-adapter-proxy, but how can I access this odatav2 service in my fiori app ? 
 
Sincerely

entry.title: Dynamically print PO line items and respective service items in smart forms
entry.content:
Hi all,

In smart form PO I need to print line items and below this service items. I have a table which I am using to print line items one below the other, but how to print service items below each line items?

please suggest.

entry.title: SE11 | create Projection view
entry.content:
Projection View

  • Projection views are used to hide fields of a table
  • A projection view contains exactly one table. (can be used on only one table).
  • You cannot define selection conditions for projection views.
  • It is also possible to access pooled tables or cluster tables with a projection view.

Step 1:   

  • GO TO SE11 and select views,
  • Give the name of view and click on ‘CREATE’ button.

Step 2: Select the ‘Projection View’ radio button.

 

 Step 3:

  • Give ‘Short Description’.
  • In ‘Basic Table’ enter the name of table and enter.

Step 4:

  • Click on ‘Table fields’.
  • Select the fields and click on ‘COPY’ button.

Step 5: Click on ‘Maintenance status’.

      Maintaince status determines how you can access the view data from ABAP programs (read only, read and change).

  • read only : Data can only be read through the view.
  • read and change: Data of the tables contained in the view can be change

Step 6:

  • Select ‘read only’ or ‘read and change’ as per need

SAVE and activate the view.

Projection View Created.

entry.title: Could I automate FK10N attachment creation with SAP GUI Scripting?
entry.content:
I'm thinking maybe there could be a way to attach multiple PDF documents to vendor line items in FK10N with a script like " where document number is 12345 create attachment from C:\Users\.... . pdf" and so on

Is it possilbe?

entry.title: apply security rules from SECPOL
entry.content:
Translator
 
 
 
 

 

Good morning dear, I am a newbie in SAP and we apply a module to

automatically generate keys, my question is how can I apply the security policies that I have in SECPOL.
I attach a screenshot of the module code and the input when executing it.

I tried to put in the "SECURITY_POLICY" input the name of the group created in SECPOL
but it doesn't work.
Sorry I'm new to ABAP.

Thank you

entry.title: SUM multiple columns together
entry.content:
Hi All,

I would like to sum all 16 period amounts using a SUM function in an ABAP CDS. The sum function works in SQL but not in ABAP CDS View. 

SUM (WKG001 + WKG002 +...+ WKG016) as WKGAMT and I am getting an error. But the same kind of statement works in SQL. but not in ABAP CDS. 

SQL Statement is like below is working fine in SQL Console

select OBJNR, WRTTP, VRGNG, BEKNZ,

sum( WKG001 + WKG002 + WKG003 + WKG004 + WKG005 + WKG006 + WKG007 + WKG008 ) as WKGAMT1,

sum( WKG009 + WKG010 + WKG011 + WKG012 + WKG013 + WKG014 + WKG015 + WKG016 ) as WKGAMT2

 

from COSP

where objnr = 'AB9999999999'

and wrttp = '04'

and vrgng = 'COIN'

and beknz = 'L'

group by

OBJNR, WRTTP, VRGNG, BEKNZ

CDS View is below

@VDM.viewType: #BASIC

 

define view ZB_COSPSUM

as

//select from cosp as A

//left outer join tka01 as B on B.kokrs = 'A000'

select from ZB_COSP

{

objnr,

wrttp,

vrgng,

beknz,

@Semantics.currencyCode: true

Currency,

@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Currency'

@DefaultAggregation: #SUM

sum( wkg009 + wkg010 + wkg011 + wkg012 + wkg013 + wkg014 + wkg015 + wkg016) as WKGAMT2

}

group by objnr, wrttp, vrgng, beknz, Currency

Any idea?

Thank you,

Arthur.

entry.title: Regarding RFC destination 'NONE' and RFC context
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Sometimes I can see RFC destination 'NONE', the RFC call is in the current system but in an RFC context.

I have checked the help doc regarding RFC context.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_700/108f625f6c53101491e88dc4cf51a6cc/7509c2df49a44c4e9aee12986cffccb4.html

But I'm not clear about the difference between if data is in RFC context or not. Could someone help to explain more on that? e.g., LUW.

Regards,
Ming

entry.title: SPAU TR not given to SUM tool
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a question on my case, while upgrading via  SUM tool we forgot to provide SPDD and SPAU TR, In SPDD phase somehow manually we moved TR to Quality system and then we executed a program. Now we are in SPAU phase so SPAU TR also we need to move manually after moving do we need to execute some program. 

Please help on my concern.

Thanks,

Pradeep.

entry.title: 'INTO' is invalid (due to grammar) error while SQL in BAPI
entry.content:
Hi guys!

The error occurs in the first INTO of the first SELECT. I have 'INTO' is invalid (due to grammar)
I need to return several tables that will become arrays in an application that will call this BAPI remotely (RFC). However, when I add this code to the SAP that will run the RFC, it gives a problem with the INTO clause.
INTO is invalid here (due to grammar), but I don't know what I'm doing wrong, because I've already run this function in other SAPs and it worked normally.
The logic of this RFC is to return the data from the MARD, MARC, MAKT and MBEW tables based on the MARA table. Then I perform a select with where in the MARA table that will return a series of items, and based on the code of these items I perform a FOR ALL ENTRIES to search for these same materials in other tables and return them separately. I can't use joins. And then I come across the INTO clause error when I use anything between the word MARA (FROM MARA) and INTO. (In this case it's the order by)
I need the up to to be able to limit the lines of this return.
Can anyone help me?

Code (also attached): 

 

FUNCTION Z_GET_MATERIAL_FULL_CUSTOM.
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*"*"Local Interface:
*" IMPORTING
*" REFERENCE(MARA_MAX_ROWS) TYPE INT4
*" REFERENCE(MARA_SKIP_ROWS) TYPE INT4
*" TABLES
*" MARA_TABLE STRUCTURE MARA
*" MARD_TABLE STRUCTURE MARD
*" MARC_TABLE STRUCTURE MARC
*" MAKT_TABLE STRUCTURE MAKT
*" MBEW_TABLE STRUCTURE MBEW
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
SELECT MATNR, MEINS, MTPOS_MARA 
FROM MARA WHERE 
              MTPOS_MARA = 'ZMAP' OR MTPOS_MARA = 'ZMAN' 
ORDER BY MATNR INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE _TABLE 
UP TO _MAX_ROWS ROWS OFFSET _SKIP_ROWS .

SELECT MATNR, LABST, LGPBE 
FROM MARD FOR ALL ENTRIES IN _TABLE WHERE 
                                       MATNR = _TABLE-MATNR 
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE @MARD_TABLE.


SELECT MATNR, MINBE, MABST, PLIFZ, DISMM, STEUC 
FROM MARC FOR ALL ENTRIES IN _TABLE WHERE 
                                        MATNR = _TABLE-MATNR 
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE _TABLE.


SELECT MATNR, MAKTX FROM MAKT 
FOR ALL ENTRIES IN _TABLE WHERE 
                              MATNR = _TABLE-MATNR AND SPRAS = 'P' 
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE _TABLE.


SELECT MATNR, VERPR FROM 
MBEW FOR ALL ENTRIES IN _TABLE WHERE 
                                   MATNR = _TABLE-MATNR 
INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE @MBEW_TABLE.


ENDFUNCTION.

entry.title: CO11N - update goods movement output type(NAST table)
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

My requirements is that, need to create the ouptupt type, while creating the goods movement in CO11N tcode.

is there any user exit or badi.

THanks with regards,

vallamuthu M

entry.title: S/4HANA Readiness check: Analyze aborted in CL_CI_TEST_NO_ORDER_BY
entry.content:
Hey! 

We get the following error on many objects:

Analyze aborted from check CL_CI_TEST_NO_ORDER_BY

If we have a look at the mentioned development object it seems to have nothing to do with the check itself.

like: 

 

 

  METHOD log.
    DATA: text_tab TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF string.

    IF log_message-key IS NOT INITIAL.
      appl_log->add_free_text_info( log_message-key ).
    ENDIF.

    IF strlen( log_message-value ) > 200.
      CALL FUNCTION 'SOTR_SERV_STRING_TO_TABLE'
        EXPORTING
          flag_no_line_breaks = 'X'
          line_length         = 200
          text                = log_message-value
        TABLES
          text_tab            = text_tab.
    ELSE.
      APPEND log_message-value TO text_tab.
    ENDIF.

    LOOP AT text_tab INTO DATA(line).
      appl_log->add_free_text_info( line ).
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDMETHOD.

 

 

So in my opinion it looks like the check had some errors and reports "analyze aborted".

There is no SAP-note the is relevant for our system:

SAP_BASIS 758
SAP_ABA 75I

Any idea what to check?

Thanks
 ~Enno

entry.title: How to delete condition tables in testsystem
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

What is the theory behind creating a condition table (e.g., pack specification) in the development system? The IMG activity where we enter the table layout not only creates our tables locally. Our input is also saved in a customizing transport, right?

When we import this transport into the next system, the system generates the same database tables locally again. And our table layout ALSO creates a table locally in $TMP in the test system, correct?

But what if I want to delete the condition table from the test system again? What steps do I need to take? This is not possible with a transport because the system has also created it locally.

Thank you.

entry.title: S/4HANA VBRK/VBRP new field DRAFT
entry.content:
Hey there!

there is the sap note 2768887 that describes how to deal with the new field DRAFT in VBRK and VBRP.

As of S/4HANA 1709, the database tables for Billing Documents, VBRK and VBRP, also contain Draft document versions. These document versions are marked via the new Boolean fields VBRK-DRAFT and VBRP-DRAFT.

Draft Document Versions must be distinguished from regular document versions.
Draft Document Versions must not be referenced anywhere and must not be used for any form of reporting etc.

The readiness check finds the following join:

    SELECT nast~kschl,
           nast~datvr,
           nast~uhrvr,
           nast~usnam,
           nast~vstat,
           entry~*,
           esr~send_request_id,
           esr~mail_address,
           esr~route_id,
           esr~doc_format,
           esr~dlv_channel,
           vbrk~vbeln,
           vbrk~vkorg,
           vbrk~vtweg,
           vbrk~spart,
           vbrk~netwr,
           vbrk~waerk,
           vbrk~fkdat,
           vbrk~kunrg,
           vbrk~kunag,
           kna1~kunnr,
           kna1~name1,
           vbpa~kunnr AS kunre
      FROM nast
      JOIN /inw/einv_entry AS entry
       ON entry~einv_id = nast~/inw/einv_entry_id
      LEFT JOIN ZZ_ESR as esr "temp left join
      on entry~einv_id = esr~einv_id
      JOIN  vbrk
        ON  nast~objky = vbrk~vbeln
       and vbrk~draft  = @space
      JOIN  knvp
        ON  knvp~vkorg = vbrk~vkorg
       AND  knvp~vtweg = vbrk~vtweg
       AND  knvp~spart = vbrk~spart
       AND  knvp~kunnr = nast~parnr
       AND  knvp~parvw = nast~parvw
      JOIN  kna1
        ON  kna1~kunnr = knvp~kunnr
      LEFT JOIN vbpa
        ON  vbpa~vbeln = vbrk~vbeln
        AND vbpa~posnr = '000000'
        AND vbpa~parvw = 'RE'
      WHERE vbrk~vbeln IN @selection-fakt_nr
      AND   vbrk~fkart IN @selection-fkart
      AND   nast~vstat IN @selection-vstat
      AND   nast~kschl IN @selection-kschl
      AND   nast~erdat IN @selection-erdat
      AND   nast~eruhr IN @selection-eruhr
      AND   nast~usnam IN @selection-usnam
      AND   entry~status_tech IN @selection-st_tech
      AND   entry~status_dispatch IN @selection-st_dispatch
      AND   esr~dlv_channel IN @selection-channel
      INTO TABLE @DATA(fetched_rows).

All I have to do is to restrict the selection so that entries with DRAFT = space are selected.

Both variants do not work and the check still insists that there is some work to do:

Change 1:

    SELECT nast~kschl,
...
      JOIN  vbrk
        ON  nast~objky = vbrk~vbeln
       and vbrk~draft  = @space
...
      INTO TABLE @DATA(fetched_rows).

Change 2:

    SELECT nast~kschl,
...
      WHERE vbrk~vbeln IN @selection-fakt_nr
...
      AND   vbrk~draft = @space 
      INTO TABLE @DATA(fetched_rows).

Any ideas why this check still produces a finding?

Thanks
~Enno

entry.title: Balance Sheet/Income Statement Custom S4HC ?
entry.content:
I have a custom request for the balance sheet/income statement report column to be made monthly.

is it possible to customize? If not, can you create a new application for the custom report? Thank You.

entry.title: How do I add subquery in SQ02?
entry.content:
Let's say I want to add a column in SQ02 with a sql statement where left join column A with MBEW where plant = XY. How do I do this?

Can you please give me example for code too?

entry.title: How to find the relation between BNAME of USR DB tables and PERNR of PA DB tables ?
entry.content:
Hi, I am trying to find and print the details of employee using his SAP Username

I am thinking of giving the input as BNAME (sap username) and I need to print this PERNR (personnel Number or Employee Id) via an ABAP report.

I searched various sources, but, I am unclear of the relation between these two fields, Can anyone please help me in this requirement ?

Thanks in Advance !
